jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Vue primary + TypeScript expert skills. Senior position with Spain explicitly listed for remote work. Missing Tailwind and Capacitor/Ionic specializations.

jobs.title: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers
jobs.rawDescription: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers Blackshark AI | Software Engineers & Platform Engineers | Full-time | Austria or Remote EU Hours | VISA sponsorship available We build geospatial AI infrastructure. Our platform lets analysts train custom object and change detection models on satellite/aerial/drone imagery in minutes, then reconstructs 3D terrain from those detections. We just shipped a planetary-scale simulation platform with Lockheed Martin powered by Unreal Engine. If you want to work on distributed systems that run in a data center one day and an edge laptop the next, we have interesting problems. Our training and inference infrastructure is processing trillions of pixels and we deliver real world impact for our customers across defense, intelligence, and local governments. Tech Stack: Python, Fast API, PyTorch, Postgres, Redis, Vue.js Infrastructure Stack: Kubernetes & Docker, Linux, AWS & Azure, Azure DevOps, Terraform, ELK, Prometheus & Grafana, ArgoCD & Helm Roles: Software Engineer - Frontend UI https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/5c596b85-5134-4601-be25-... Software Engineer - Data Plane Team: https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/6110fedd-5cd8-40e5-ac11-... Platform Engineer - Deployment Team: https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/56a85834-d986-4105-9cc8-... or reach out to HM with questions at: 'eivanov@' + username[:-2] + '.' + username[-2:].lower() Location: Austria or Remote EU Hours

score.reason: Vue.js and EU-remote location fit, but company is fundamentally geospatial AI infrastructure. Even the Frontend UI role would build interfaces to ML models and satellite analysis, not traditional product UIs. Three roles listed without individual specs.

jobs.title: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. The role As a Staff level LLM Interaction Engineer , you’ll help shape how n8n’s AI Workflow Builder works end-to-end. This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. That means building systems that consistently generate the right output, stay grounded in the user’s workflow, and improve quickly through iteration and evaluation. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, a

score.reason: Staff-level role with Vue/TypeScript in stack and Europe-remote location fit. However, the position is fundamentally an LLM orchestration engineer role focused on AI workflow systems, not frontend development. This conflicts with Alfonso's core specialization.
red_flags: n8n platform is AI-first, not FE-first

jobs.title: Frontend Developer Vue / NuxtJS Senior (100% teletrabajo)
jobs.rawDescription: Únete a nuestro equipo como Frontend Vue / NuxtJS (100% teletrabajo) Asegúrese de leer la descripción completa a continuación y, si confía en que cumple todos los requisitos, envíe su solicitud de inmediato. Si tienes experiencia desarrollando aplicaciones web modernas con Vue y NuxtJS, y buscas un nuevo reto profesional en modalidad 100% remoto, ¡esta es tu oportunidad! Buscamos un Desarrollador Frontend Senior con amplia experiencia demostrable en Nuxt y Vue.js, capaz de liderar el desarrollo de interfaces complejas, colaborar estrechamente con el equipo backend y aportar criterio técnico en la arquitectura del BFF y del frontend. Requisitos Experiencia sólida (mínimo 3 años en adelante) desarrollando aplicaciones web con Vue.js y Nuxt. Conocimientos avanzados de JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 / SCSS. Experiencia en arquitecturas BFF (Backend for Frontend) y consumo de APIs REST. Dominio del estado global (Vuex, Pinia) y patrones de diseño de componentes. Experiencia con Vite / Webpack, Git y metodologías ágiles. Buen entendimiento de integración frontend-backend y comunicación con APIs. ¿Qué ofrecemos? Contrato indefinido : Desde el primer día, con opción de 12 o 14 pagas. Modelo 100% teletrabajo Horario flexible : horario flexible entrada 8.30h salida 18h con viernes intensivo de 8h a 15h y en verano (julio y agosto) intensivo de 8h a 15h Vacaciones : 22 días de vacaciones + 2 días de libre disposición, además de los días 24 y 31 de diciembre libres. Retribución flexible : Tarjeta restaurante, cheque guardería, seguro médico, formación y otros beneficios con ventajas fiscales. Club de ventajas : Descuentos en tecnología, ocio y formación. Formación continua : Acceso a Udemy Business, cursos de idiomas, certificaciones oficiales y formación técnica. Plan de carrera : Acompañamiento para crecer, especializarte o asumir nuevos retos. Bienestar integral : Programas de nutrición, actividad física y equilibrio emocional. Eventos sociales : Actividades para conectar co

score.reason: Vue.js is primary and Pinia is listed, excellent fit. Location (100% remote, Spain-based) and seniority (Senior) are perfect. However, the role requires demonstrable deep Nuxt expertise, which Alfonso has not used in production—a significant technical gap requiring substantial ramp-up.
red_flags: Requires deep Nuxt expertise, no production experience

jobs.title: Head of Engineering & Infrastructure — Full-Time

Applications: Rails, Vue.js/Typescript, Rust Perks: Paid time off (2 weeks vacation, 5 statutory holidays, 2 weeks at Christmas, 4-day summer workweeks), annual company retreat, anniversary gift ($200/year), monthly music subscription reimbursement, fully paid maternity & paternity leave. Location: Remote

score.reason: Vue.js is secondary in a primarily infrastructure/DevOps leadership role. This demands deep Kubernetes, Terraform, and database expertise to manage large-scale systems—not frontend engineering. Alfonso is a senior IC, not an infrastructure or engineering manager.

Extens

jobs.title: Web-kehittäjä B2B-digimarkkinointiin (etätyö)
jobs.rawDescription: Etsimme lahjakasta web-kehittäjää vahvistamaan digimarkkinointitiimimme! Myymme yrityksille laadukkaita verkkosivuja, digimainontaa sekä sosiaalisen median ylläpitoa – ja nyt etsimme osaavaa tekijää toteuttamaan nämä projektit käytännössä. Tehtäväsi Pääasiallinen tehtäväsi on toteuttaa asiakkaille laadukkaita verkkosivuja sekä some- ja mainoskampanjoita. Saat toimeksiannot valmiiksi neuvotelluista projekteista ja vastaat toteutuksen laadusta alusta loppuun. Palkkaus Täysin provisiopohjainen – provisio maksetaan, kun asiakas on ostanut palvelun ja projekti on toimitettu Realistinen ansaintataso aktiivisella tekemisellä on erittäin kilpailukykyinen – ylöspäin ei rajaa Myöhemmin mahdollisuus neuvotella kiinteämmästä yhteistyömallista Lisätulomahdollisuus, jos sinulla on myös myynti- tai asiakashankintaosaamista Tarjoamme sinulle Valmiiksi hankitut asiakkaat ja projektit – sinun ei tarvitse myydä Selkeät briiffit ja toimivat prosessit Jatkuva tuki ja sparraus tiimiltä Joustavat työajat – päätät itse milloin ja miten teet 100 % etätyö – voit työskennellä mistä päin maailmaa tahansa Hyvät bonukset pidemmästä yhteistyöstä Odotamme sinulta Osaamista verkkosivujen toteutuksesta (esim. WordPress, WebflowHTML, CSS ja JavaScript) Kokemus moderneista frameworkeista (React, Vue, tai vastaava) Perustietämystä some-markkinoinnista tai digimainonnasta on eduksi Itseohjautuvuutta ja kykyä toimittaa projektit sovitussa aikataulussa Huolellisuutta ja laatutietoisuutta – asiakkaan tyytyväisyys on prioriteetti Halua oppia ja kehittyä digitaalisen markkinoinnin kentällä Pakolliset työkalut Laskutusvalmius esim. kevytyrittäjänä (opastamme tarvittaessa alkuun) Jos olet taitava tekijä, joka haluaa tehdä koodausta ja verkkosivuprojekteja joustavasti omaan tahtiisi – tämä on loistava mahdollisuus sinulle! Kerro hakemuksessa: – Mitä teknologioita ja työkaluja osaat – Näytä esimerkkejä aiemmista töistäsi (portfolio tai linkit) Odotamme innolla kuulevamme sinusta! Location: Helsinki, FI

score.reason: Vue is secondary option, not primary framework. Role emphasizes WordPress/Webflow agency work (not modern frontend engineering), and commission-only freelance model conflicts with senior developer compensation expectations.
